assessment.note: She says the work was heavier than she let on, which signals hidden strain and some mismatch between apparent and actual load; also hints at wellbeing risk worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Heavier than sounded
new_queue.name: When you say 'heavier' — what was making it heavy day to day?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific load Lin just named so the friction is concrete rather than implied.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: What to drop
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to take on next?
new_queue.description: Forces a trade-off conversation about priorities and capacity.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would actually be useful from me over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Gets concrete about the manager support Lin wants without assuming the answer.

new_queue.label: Next-two-weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked about, what's your priority for the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes by landing on a concrete commitment for the next check-in window.
